global_description: A small, stocky bird with a rounded body and short tail. It has a predominantly brown and buff plumage with streaked patterns. The head is flat with a pale eye ring and a short, conical bill. The wings are short and rounded.
discriminative_attributes: Flat head with pale eye ring

part_details.head: Flat with a pale eye ring and brown streaks.
part_details.bill: Short, conical, and pale in color.
part_details.plumage: Brown and buff with streaked patterns.

spatial_relations: The short conical bill is positioned at the front of the flat head.
The rounded wings are attached to the sides of the body.
The short tail extends from the rear of the body.
